summary: The provided literature supports limited but observed benefits from sulindac in slowing adenoma growth and size reduction in FAP patients over time; however, there is no credible evidence linking eflornithine to any preventive effects against disease progression. Hence, claiming both agents together are effective is not justified based on current data.
